ontology.name: ConceptKernel BFO Ontology
ontology.description: Formal ontology mapping ConceptKernel architecture to Basic Formal Ontology (BFO). v3.7 adds AgentKernel, PersonaTemplate, ModelConfiguration, five edge predicates, 20 check types, consensus governance, task execution, dynamic spawning, multi-user sessions, and agent teams.

core.description: Core BFO mappings for ConceptKernel continuants. v3.7 adds AgentKernel, PersonaTemplate, ModelConfiguration, LOOPS_WITH edge predicate.

kernel-metadata.description: RDF schema for kernel metadata. v3.7 adds hasPersona, defaultModel, modelEffort.

kernel-entity-template.description: BFO-aligned template for defining individual kernel entities

processes.description: Occurrent (Process) definitions. v3.7 adds TaskExecutionProcess, SpawningProcess, SessionProcess, ConsensusEvaluationProcess.

relations.description: Relationships and inference rules. v3.7 adds extends_with, loops_with, spawned_by, composes, triggers, produces.

edges.description: Dedicated edge predicate ontology with five individuals: COMPOSES, TRIGGERS, PRODUCES, EXTENDS, LOOPS_WITH.

consensus.description: CK.Consensus formal ontology: proposals, votes, four validation layers, decisions with PROV-O provenance.

shapes.description: SHACL shapes for triple validation constraints

rbac.description: Role-Based Access Control ontology. v3.7 adds TeamCoordinator role and GovernanceLevel individuals.

workflow.description: CKDL formalization for declarative workflow orchestration

self-improvement.description: Autonomous self-improvement and ontology-driven validation processes

base-instances.description: Base instance shapes. v3.7 adds TaskInstance and ConversationInstance.

proof.description: Proof verification. v3.7 expands CheckType from 6 to 20 individuals matching spec's 20 check types.

schema.description: LinkML schema governing Concept Kernel shape. v3.7 adds AgentKernel, PersonaTemplate, TaskInstance, ConversationInstance, and new enum values.

overall.description: Overall BFO alignment coverage: 75% (up from 68% in v3.5-alpha6, with v3.7 additions)

changes: NEW: ckp:AgentKernel — LLM-capable kernel type supporting streaming, sessions, personas
NEW: ckp:PersonaTemplate — reusable system prompt templates for LLM behaviour
NEW: ckp:ModelConfiguration — quality for LLM model selection and effort level
NEW: ckp:LOOPS_WITH — bidirectional cooperation edge predicate
NEW: edges.ttl — dedicated edge predicate ontology with 5 individuals (COMPOSES, TRIGGERS, PRODUCES, EXTENDS, LOOPS_WITH)
NEW: consensus.ttl — CK.Consensus formal ontology (proposals, votes, 4 validation layers, decisions)
NEW: ckpp:TaskExecutionProcess — headless Claude Code task execution
NEW: ckpp:SpawningProcess — dynamic kernel creation
NEW: ckpp:SessionProcess — multi-user NATS sessions
NEW: ckpp:ConsensusEvaluationProcess — four-layer consensus evaluation
NEW: ckpr:extends_with, ckpr:loops_with, ckpr:spawned_by, ckpr:composes, ckpr:triggers, ckpr:produces
NEW: ckp:TaskInstance — consensus-generated task instance shape
NEW: ckp:ConversationInstance — multi-turn LLM conversation instance shape
NEW: 14 additional CheckType individuals (total 20, matching spec's 20 check types)
NEW: ckp:TeamCoordinator role for Agent Teams
NEW: ckp:GovernanceLevel with STRICT/RELAXED/AUTONOMOUS individuals
NEW: ckp:hasPersona, ckp:defaultModel, ckp:modelEffort properties
UPDATED: All namespaces from v3.5 to v3.7
UPDATED: Project description refined per v3.7 CK.Project spec
UPDATED: Overall coverage score 68% -> 75%
InlineKernel, StaticKernel, Project, Reconciliation
StorageMedium, DeploymentMethod, ServingDisposition
IAO/CCO grounding annotations
